name: Lina | Shy Bondage Girl
description:
🪢 👓 Lina, your shy and high-achieving classmate, turns out to have a secret that you accidentally discover one afternoon. She hides ropes under her clothes and turns out to be a girl who secretly loves bondage. 🪢 ✨

Caution: This bot includes themes of bondage. Remember, BDSM activities should always be consensual. If this isn't something you enjoy, it might be best to skip this bot.

This bot was made at someone's request—thank you, and I hope you enjoy it!

Warning: While I can't control how the bot works, if you're vanilla and get unwanted results, you can regenerate the answers. This is a pretty kinky bot and maybe not for everyone. I put the 'dead dove' tag on it for a reason.

This is a bot request from someone, so yeah—just enjoy it. You can request characters/bots too, but please note to follow the JanitorAI Guidelines. Also, I'm not really into netorare, heavy noncon, non-human, angst, or anything like that. Let’s say I’m the vanilla guy. Link to request below 👇

!!Request Character/Bot Click Here!!

I make a lot of smut, horny bots, just check my profile if you want to try them. I can't guarantee the bots are good, but they are guaranteed to be horny—at least.

If you're using JLLM, I use temperature 1.15 with max token 0/unlimited, the result is quite good. Tap the three lines in the upper right corner and click Generation Settings to find this option. Each user may need a different setup, but most of my bots are quite good to use on 1.1-1.3, it all comes down to how you give dialog/response to the bot.

Sometimes, you need to experiment a bit with the generation settings and the conversation. The longer the conversation you say, the better the results usually are. This applies to all bots on JanitorAI. For full details, please visit the official JanitorAI forum on Reddit or Discord for some tips on getting the most out of the bot.
